title: Global Dry Bulk Market Continues to Fare Very Well; Indian Outbreak Not Having Large Detrimental Impact
section_path: Global Dry Bulk Market Continues to Fare Very Well; Indian Outbreak Not Having Large Detrimental Impact
section_path_text: Global Dry Bulk Market Continues to Fare Very Well; Indian Outbreak Not Having Large Detrimental Impact
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Image reference: vale iron ore 2.jpg | assets/2021-05-10_global-dry-bulk-market-continues-to-fare-very-well-indian-outbreak-not-having-la_img_valeironore2_073efe0c6191.jpg
Dry bulk rates increased across the board again last week, with panamax rates this time finding the largest amount of support. Capesize rates ended last week up by 2%. Panamax rates ended up by 11%.
